name: LLM Wiki
description: Maintains a persistent, LLM-managed personal wiki — ingest sources, query knowledge, and lint the wiki for health.
author: kimcharli

commands.name: wiki-init
commands.description: Bootstrap a new wiki in the current project

commands.name: wiki-ingest
commands.description: Process a raw source file and integrate it into the wiki

commands.name: wiki-query
commands.description: Answer a question using wiki pages with citations

commands.name: wiki-lint
commands.description: Health-check the wiki for orphans, contradictions, and gaps

features: Bootstrap a new wiki with raw/, wiki/, index.md, log.md, and WIKI.md schema
Ingest single sources: extract, write wiki pages, update index and log
Query wiki with index-first navigation and citation-backed answers
File valuable query answers back into the wiki as new pages
Lint for orphan pages, contradictions, stale claims, and missing cross-references
Structured log format parseable with standard unix tools
YAML frontmatter on all wiki pages for Dataview and LLM staleness reasoning
